parsed_profile.failure_description: All constituent chapter_cards returned LLM unavailable fallback stubs with zero confidence. No narrative content, story mechanics, craft observations, or design patterns could be extracted. Volume aggregation across all 22 volumes yielded empty structures. Downstream book_design_card distillation blocked by complete source data absence.

core_engine.reason: insufficient signal from all source chapters

craft_profile.observation: This book_design_card represents a terminal distillation failure. The distillation pipeline encountered 100% LLM unavailable responses across 584 chapters spanning 22 volumes. No arc_function, dominant_engine, state_progression, turning_points, setup_payoff_rhythm, reader_rewards, or open_hooks were extractable. The book_design_card inherits the zero-confidence state of its source chapter_cards.
craft_profile.recommendation: Re-process source text through functional LLM pipeline before attempting chapter_card generation. Only after chapter_cards contain actual narrative content can volume_card and book_design_card distillation succeed.
